Definition: The midpoint of the hairline, the superior limit of the face for facial height proportions.
The most prominent point of the forehead in the midline, between the eyebrows.
The inner corner of the right eye at the medial palpebral commissure.
The inner corner of the left eye at the medial palpebral commissure.
The outer corner of the right eye at the lateral palpebral commissure.
The outer corner of the left eye at the lateral palpebral commissure.
The midpoint of the soft tissue contour at the nasal root, overlying the frontonasal suture.
The most lateral point of the right alar contour, defining nasal width.
The most lateral point of the left alar contour, defining nasal width.
The midpoint of the angle at the columella base where the upper lip meets the nasal septum.
The peak of Cupid's bow on the right side, at the highest point of the vermilion border.
The peak of Cupid's bow on the left side, at the highest point of the vermilion border.
The right corner of the mouth at the labial commissure.
The left corner of the mouth at the labial commissure.
The most lateral point of the right zygomatic arch, defining the widest facial breadth.
The most lateral point of the left zygomatic arch, defining the widest facial breadth.
The most lateral and inferior point of the right mandibular angle.
The most lateral and inferior point of the left mandibular angle.
The most inferior point of the soft tissue chin in the midline.
